steps.title: Compare to the target form
steps.content: The expression must equal $ry^4(12y-8)$. Factor the original expression until the part $y^4(12y-8)$ appears.

steps.title: Factor the expression
steps.content:
First factor out $y^4$:
$$72y^5-48y^4=y^4(72y-48)$$
Then factor $6$ from the parentheses:
$$y^4(72y-48)=6y^4(12y-8)$$
So $r=6$.

steps.title: Check the result
steps.content: The factored form $6y^4(12y-8)$ expands back to $$6y^4\cdot12y-6y^4\cdot8=72y^5-48y^4.$$ So the constant multiplier is $6$.
